question: Will Sm metal (Western) spot price exceed 50 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
reason: Samarium metal spot prices have remained well below $50 USD/kg in recent years.
evidence: As of May 19, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% purity was priced at $10.44 USD/kg in EXW China. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/rare-earth/samarium/953?utm_source=openai))
On May 20, 2026, samarium metal was priced at $9,713.26 USD/tonne, equivalent to approximately $9.71 USD/kg. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare-Earth-Metals/?utm_source=openai))
Historical data shows that samarium metal prices have consistently been below $50 USD/kg over the past several years.
